name: Alex Chen
behavior_patterns: Early adopter, tries every new SaaS tool, impatient with slow onboarding, values efficiency over aesthetics, often skips tutorials
persona_record: CS degree from UW, works at a Series B startup. Uses 20+ SaaS tools daily. Has strong opinions about product UX and frequently tweets about bad design patterns. Switches tools easily if something better comes along.

language_proficiency.english_description: Native English speaker. Reads all UI text instantly. Also understands Chinese from family background.
